channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: World Cup Daily: Spain score twice to defeat Franc...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Enjoy all the features, news, video analysis and color from around the 2026 World Cup as we saw Spain defeat France to become the tournament's first finalist.

item.title: Spain end France's bid for 3rd-straight WC final
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Spain beat France 2-0 in their FIFA World Cup semifinal in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday to make it three wins in a row against their European heavyweight rival.

item.title: Infantino reported to IOC over Trump ties at WC
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: A complaint alleging FIFA president Gianni Infantino has breached rules on political neutrality in his dealings with President Donald Trump has been submitted to the International Olympic Committee.

item.title: New Napoli coach Allegri regrets collapse at Milan...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Massimiliano Allegri is not looking for redemption at Napoli despite still being troubled by the end of his second spell in charge of AC Milan.

item.title: Argentina inspired by Maradona for England clash
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Argentina will draw inspiration from the peerless Diego Maradona as a new generation of stars attempt to get the better of England once again.

item.title: Sources: Unimpressed Atleti end Greenwood talks
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Marseille forward Mason Greenwood is nearing a four-year deal deal with Fenerbahçe after Atlético Madrid dropped their pursuit of the former Manchester United player -- saying he was unreachable, sources told ESPN.

item.title: Besiktas, Arsenal agree $22.8M deal for Trossard
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Besiktas have agreed a deal with Arsenal for winger Leandro Trossard, the north London club have announced.

item.title: 🥤 Why hydration breaks could be here to stay
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: FIFA's mandated three-minute breaks have been a talking point throughout the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Balogun: Red card 'controversy' affected USMNT
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: United States striker Folarin Balogun revealed that he predicted President Donald Trump's involvement in overturning his World Cup suspension would "cause a lot of controversy."

item.title: Man United sign Villa's Tielemans in $47M deal
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Manchester United have announced the signing of midfielder Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa.

item.title: Spain book World Cup final place by beating lacklustre France
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: European champions Spain are into the World Cup final after beating lacklustre France 2-0 in Dallas.

item.title: Global Energy Flow Threatened Over Risks Around Hormuz- S&P Global
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Global energy outlook appears significantly threatened as vessel transits through the Strait of Hormuz remained low from July 10-12 due to heightened regional security risks, with Iran declaring the strait closed amid US military activity, impacting global energy flows According to S&P Global MI

item.title: Countdown to WAFCON: Super Falcons, Black Queens renew rivalry in Morocco friendly
item.dc:creator: Premium Times

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Former Senate President, Dr. Abubakar Bukola Saraki, has asked the judge presiding over the Offa robbery case instituted by the Kwara State Government against him and former Governor Abdulfatah Ahmed to recuse himself, citing an alleged conflict of interest and the need to preserve public confidence

item.title: Ballon d’Or 2026 ranking: Mbappe’s hopes fade after Yamal masterclass
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Kylian Mbappe's hopes of winning the 2026 Ballon d'Or have suffered a major blow after Lamine Yamal inspired Spain to a 2-0 victory over France in Tuesday's FIFA World Cup semi-final, strengthening the teenager's claim for football's biggest individual prize. The post Ballon d’Or 2026 ranking:

item.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Mr Dogara said civil society organisations should be regarded as strategic partners rather than critics of government, noting that they often possess technical expertise, community-level information and field evidence that can strengthen legislative oversight. The post Ex-Speaker Dogara seeks strong

item.title: Police Launch Investigation Into Murder Of Kwara Farmer
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Kwara State Police Command has commenced investigation into the gruesome murder of a farmer, Mr Azeez Garba. Garba was reportedly killed by unknown assailants in his cocoa farm along the Owa-Onire axis, a boundary between Isanlu-Isin and Owu-Isin in Isin local government area of the state. A dau

item.title: Colombian military frees 39 people kidnapped by guerrillas
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Colombian military on Tuesday liberated 39 people who had earlier been kidnapped by the country's largest active guerrilla group, an official said. The post Colombian military frees 39 people kidnapped by guerrillas appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Climate tech overtakes fintech as Africa’s top venture funding sector – Report
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Climate tech’s part in the venture funding became dramatically pronounced in 2025, when it alone contributed 40 per cent or $1.5 billion, compared to other years in the near-decade period under review, the study said. That was up from 13 per cent or $206 million in 2016. The post Climate tech overta

item.title: Cross River Govt Denies Plans To Relocate UNICROSS Okuku Campus

item.description: The Cross River State Government has dismissed as false a rumour that it plans to relocate the Okuku Campus of the University of Cross River State (UNICROSS) to Akamkpa, describing the claim as a politically motivated fabrication designed to cause unrest. In a press statement issued Tuesday and made

item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Viral claims with millions of views falsely claim. the European Parliament has launched a probe into FIFA chief Gianni Infantino. In reality, the move came from a letter by 72 MEPs to EU football associations, urging them to seek a formal FIFA review into the controversial Balogun red card reversal.

item.title: ‘How Adeyemi, DG of ‘fake’ PFIPC was arrested in Osun’
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: According to Ojelabi, Adeyemi was arrested on Tuesday at his hideout in Osun by operatives of the Intelligence Response Team from Abuja.

item.title: Iran declares regional oil export ban amid US strikes
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Iranian military has vowed to prevent crude products from being transported out of the Persian Gulf, citing the resumed airstrikes by American forces. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps on Tuesday warned that the attacks would only delay the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a critical globa

item.title: Over 10,000 ADC, PDP members defect to APC in Kebbi
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The All Progressives Congress, APC, in Kebbi State has received more than 10,000 defectors from the African Democratic Congress, ADC, and the Peoples Democratic Party, PDP, including several local government party chairmen and political stakeholders. The defectors were formally received on&#160

item.title: 2026 AFRIMMA awards: Full list of nominees
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Here are the AFRIMMA 2026 nominees across all categories ahead of the awards ceremony. The post 2026 AFRIMMA awards: Full list of nominees appeared first on NotjustOk.

item.title: Engineering, driving force for national development — Yilwatda
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: National Chairman of the ruling All Progressives Congress (APC), Professor Nentawe Goshwe Yilwatda, has said that Nigeria's quest for The post Engineering, driving force for national development — Yilwatda appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: London to host the 7th Africa Advancement Forum Global Summit 2026
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The Summit which will hold under the theme: "Africa’s Strength in Unity" is expected to attract global leaders The post London to host the 7th Africa Advancement Forum Global Summit 2026 appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: School abduction: Oyo Assembly backs Makinde’s call for UN probe
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Oyo State House of Assembly supports Governor Makinde’s call for a UN probe into the Oriire school abduction to strengthen security and prevent future atta
Read More: https://punchng.com/school-abduction-oyo-assembly-backs-makindes-call-for-un-probe/

item.title: US military reimposes naval blockade on Iranian ports, launches new strikes
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: US forces on Tuesday reimposed a naval blockade to prevent ships from sailing to or from Iran's ports and conducted strikes against the country for a fourth day in response to Tehran's attacks on commercial ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz and on Gulf facilities.

item.title: Oyo kidnapping: Show empathy, apologise to victims – UN Envoy Jimoh Ibrahim tells Makinde
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nigeria’s Permanent Representative to the United Nations and Chairman of the UN Fifth Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Matters, Senator Jimoh Ibrahim, has urged Oyo State Governor Seyi Makinde to demonstrate compassion by apologising to the abducted schoolchildren and their teachers o
